title: Nvidium Performance (Full)
description: ModPack mainly for Nvidia GPUs to give better Chunk times and Higher Render Distance. This uses Fabric as a base to load the Mods.
body:
ModPack mainly for Nvidia GPUs to give better Chunk times and Higher Render Distance. This uses Fabric as a base to load the Mods. This is a optimised ModPack for High Chunk count and FPS, designed around Nvidium. This is mainly for MC 1.21.1 as of Nvidium not being supported on any newer versions of Minecraft.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vKYWJWimMMM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Version Notes:**

- MC 1.21.6 and **UP**: Nvidium mod for these versions is **EXPEREMENTAL** as its currently in BETA for these MC versions. For these versions, Nvidium is from [GITHUB](https://github.com/drouarb/nvidium). This is why **these** Versions of the Mod Pack are marked as **BETA**.

- MC 1.21.6 and **UP**: Modern Fix **isnt** Supported/Updated for these MC versions yet, so they **wont** be included in the Mod Pack for these MC Versions.

- MC 1.21.7 and **UP**: Noisium **isnt** Supported/Updated for these MC versions yet, so they **wont** be included in the Mod Pack for these MC Versions. 

**Mods Used:** 

- BadOptimizations

- Bobby

- Cloth Config

- Debugify

- Fabric API

- Mod Menu

- Model Gap Fix

- Nvidium

- Noisium

- Place Holder API

- Sodium

- Lithium

- Modern Fix

- More Culling

- Ferrite Core
  
- Entity Culling

- Immediately Fast

- Krypton

Logo made with the help of **Canva.**

**Licensing Note:** This modpack is an independent project and is NOT officially associated with or endorsed by the original developers of Nvidium, Sodium, or any other included mod. All mods included in this ModPack are open-source and used under their respective licenses (mostly MIT or GPL).
